title: AE2 Master Race (AMR)
description: Race for the best AE2 network with this modpack!
body:
# AE2 Master Race

**The Race for the Best Network in AE2**

---

### Have you ever wanted a tech modpack that *just works*?

Me neither.

But this modpack is far more than that.

In this pack, you'll get some of the greatest tech (and tech-adjacent) mods available for NeoForge, such as:

- **Applied Energistics 2** — the star of the show  
- **Mekanism** (and its addons)  
- **Advent of Ascension (AOA)**  
- **Create** (+ addons)  
- **Farmer's Delight**

With these mods, you'll be able to build a complex main network and all kinds of machines.

**Don't miss the fun — download the pack!**
